if.test: login_user_id != null and login_user_id != '' and (role_manage_id == null or role_manage_id == '' or role_manage_id != '1')
pd.login_user_id != null and pd.login_user_id != '' and (pd.role_manage_id == null or pd.role_manage_id == '' or pd.role_manage_id != '1')

mapper.sql: su.id id, su.schedule_id schedule_id, su.user_id user_id, su.content content, su.parent_id parent_id, su.create_time create_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_schedule_comment ( schedule_id, user_id, content, parent_id, create_time ) values ( #{schedule_id}, #{user_id}, #{content}, #{parent_id}, now() )
